intro: 20 standalone mysteries. Can you solve them all?
description:
Shadow Case Files: Short Mysteries is a mystery quiz game featuring 20 standalone cases.
Each case presents a different incident, clue, or inconsistency for you to examine as you work toward the truth.

With its short-form structure, each mystery is easy to pick up and play, whether you have a few spare minutes or want to solve several cases in one sitting.

Read carefully, spot the hidden hints, and uncover what really happened.

Perfect for players who enjoy mystery stories, deduction, and bite-sized brain-teasing challenges.
